WDP / CURRENT SITE DESIGN STUDY · 03 ROUTES

A PHONE-SIZED FORK IN THE ROAD

Same person.
Three different first impressions.

These are not themes. Each route changes the composition, pace, and way the work becomes visible. Open all three; trust the one you want to keep touching.

A ILLUSTRATED / EDITORIALWarm StudioA polished desk full of color, little artifacts, and optional personality. ↗ B CLEAN / EXPLANATORYField NotesA restrained working document with purposeful diagrams woven into the story. ↗ C PLAYFUL / FUNCTIONALProduct LabA bright collection of tiny working demos—clear enough to use, odd enough to remember. ↗
HOW TO COMPARE

Try each on a phone. Notice what you understand in ten seconds, then what rewards a second minute.

No trackers · no remote assetswdp@wdpronovost.com
